customer_messages.body: We are actively monitoring your account and have identified areas that require immediate attention. Our team has been alerted and is coordinating a response across the relevant departments. You can expect a follow-up from your dedicated account team within one business day. We appreciate your continued partnership and are committed to resolving these matters promptly.
